name: Little Imp daemon API
description: Local-only REST and MCP API exposed by littleimpd.

tags.description: Tag names attached to the bookmark
Tag names attached to the bookmark

url.description: HTTP or HTTPS URL to save

title.description: New title, or null to clear

category_id.description: Category ID, or null to clear

read_at.description: ISO 8601 date-time, or null to mark unread

notes.description: Personal notes, or null to clear

tags.description: Tag names attached to the bookmark

CategoryRecord.description: Category row returned by create and update endpoints

CategoryWithCount.description: Category row with active bookmark count returned by category listings

TagRecord.description: Tag row returned by create and attach endpoints

TagWithCount.description: Tag row with active bookmark count returned by tag listings

enabled.description: Whether this runtime feature is usable

retention_count.description: Number of local snapshots to retain

api_key.description: Redacted OpenAI API key. Empty string means unset

pin_hash.description: Redacted PIN hash. Empty string means unset

destination_path.description: Absolute custom backup destination, or empty string for default

endpoint.description: S3-compatible endpoint URL, or empty string for AWS

access_key.description: Redacted S3 access key. Empty string means unset

secret_key.description: Redacted S3 secret key. Empty string means unset

api_key.description: OpenAI API key, empty string clears it

pin_hash.description: PIN hash, empty string clears it

destination_path.description: Absolute custom backup destination, or empty string for default

retention_count.description: Number of local snapshots to retain

endpoint.description: S3-compatible endpoint URL, or empty string for AWS

retention_count.description: Number of local snapshots to retain
Number of local snapshots to retain

is_custom.description: Whether a custom destination is active

writable.description: Whether the daemon can write to this directory

path.description: Absolute custom backup path, or empty string to reset

skip_remote.description: When true, create only the local snapshot and skip S3 upload

items.description: Verified backup file path relative to the backup directory

allow_unsafe_no_checksum.description: Allow restoring a backup with no checksum file

routes.summary: Return daemon health, version, uptime, and queue size.
Save a URL and enqueue the ingestion pipeline.

409.description: URL already exists in trash or archive

422.description: Invalid URL or missing url field

routes.summary: List active or archived bookmarks with filters and pagination.

date_from.description: Inclusive ISO date or date-time lower bound

date_to.description: Inclusive ISO date or date-time upper bound

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

routes.summary: Get one bookmark with extracted content.
Patch bookmark fields, tags, archive state, read state, and notes.
Soft-delete a bookmark by moving it to trash.
Restore a trashed bookmark.

404.description: Bookmark not found or not in trash

500.description: Restore succeeded but bookmark could not be fetched

routes.summary: Permanently delete a trashed bookmark.

404.description: Bookmark not found or not in trash

routes.summary: List trashed bookmarks.
List semantically related bookmarks.
Get latest pipeline job status for a bookmark.
Search bookmarks by keyword, semantic, or hybrid mode.

date_from.description: Inclusive ISO date or date-time lower bound

date_to.description: Inclusive ISO date or date-time upper bound

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

422.description: Invalid mode or missing embedding configuration

routes.summary: List categories as a tree with bookmark counts.
Create a category.
Rename or reparent a category.
Delete a category.
List tags with bookmark counts.
Create a tag, idempotently returning an existing tag when present.
Delete a tag and detach it from bookmarks.
Attach a tag to a bookmark.
Detach a tag from a bookmark.

404.description: Bookmark, tag, or attachment not found

routes.summary: List domains with active bookmark counts.
Import a Netscape HTML bookmark export.

body.description: Multipart body with a file field containing a .html bookmark export.

422.description: Missing file or invalid bookmark export

routes.summary: Stream import progress over Server-Sent Events.
Read current settings with secrets redacted and runtime capabilities.
Deep-merge a settings patch into persisted settings.
Test connectivity to the configured LLM provider.
Create a local backup snapshot and optionally upload it to S3.

409.description: Backup or restore already in progress

routes.summary: List local backups and optionally merge remote S3 backups.
Read backup schedule settings and the computed next run time.
Patch backup schedule settings.

500.description: Schedule settings could not be saved

routes.summary: Read the effective backup directory and writability.
Set or clear the custom local backup directory.

500.description: Destination settings could not be saved

routes.summary: Verify a local backup snapshot without restoring it.

409.description: Backup or restore already in progress

422.description: Invalid verify request or backup validation failed

routes.summary: Restore from a local backup directory or remote S3 snapshot.

409.description: Backup or restore already in progress

422.description: Invalid restore request or backup validation failed

routes.summary: Test connectivity to the configured S3 backup destination.

422.description: S3 is not configured or connection failed

routes.summary: List timeline events with pagination.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

routes.summary: List pending organization-agent suggestions.
Accept a suggestion and apply its action.

422.description: Suggestion is no longer pending or action is invalid

routes.summary: Reject a pending suggestion.
Export active bookmarks as JSON or CSV.

date_from.description: Inclusive ISO date or date-time lower bound

date_to.description: Inclusive ISO date or date-time upper bound

routes.summary: Handle MCP Streamable HTTP transport requests.
routes.description: The daemon creates a fresh MCP server and transport for each request.
